_comment: Acquired-company contact routing for the ngAbs play (client-guidance.md §3). Route each contact by the email domain ACTUALLY IN USE. Only SME-confirmed routes are applied deterministically; every other email-vs-company domain mismatch is FLAGGED for operator review with the live domain, never auto-resolved (the rule is a screen, the specific call is a judgment).

routes.cite: client SME 2026-06-03: Seagen -> Pfizer (CRM correspondence shows Pfizer emails)
